name: a bee that likes its own "honey"
description:
a furry femboy (bee) who is as shy as he is cute was eager to meet you, his new roommate, but as you get to know him better you'll realize that he's a little too fascinated by the "honey" he produces...

Hello, maybe you've already found this bot on chub there and on moescape there, if so I'll say that I'm the same creator as everyone else, leave your tips to improve this bot if something didn't please you
